hero.subtitle: Your trusted partner for e-commerce, live commerce, and market expansion across Vietnam, the Philippines, Singapore, Malaysia, and beyond.

company.title: COMPANY
company.subtitle: About DIVOOST
company.heading: Your Gateway to Southeast Asian Markets
company.desc1: DIVOOST is a Vietnam-based global e-commerce company specializing in connecting Korean brands with Southeast Asian consumers. We provide end-to-end solutions from certification and market testing to large-scale live commerce operations.
company.desc2: Based in Hanoi, we operate as an independent partner focused on delivering authentic Korean products and experiences to the rapidly growing Vietnamese and Southeast Asian markets.
company.value1Desc: Bridge between Korean brands and Southeast Asian consumers
company.value2Desc: Deliver authentic Korean experiences with local expertise

business.title: BUSINESS
business.subtitle: Our Core Services
business.card1Desc: Full-service e-commerce management on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, and other major Southeast Asian platforms.
business.card2Desc: Professional livestream shopping services with trained hosts and influencer partnerships to drive real-time sales.
business.card3Desc: Seamless cross-border e-commerce enabling Korean brands to reach Vietnamese and Southeast Asian consumers.

certification.title: CERTIFICATION
certification.subtitle: Market Entry Certification Services
certification.heading: Unlock Southeast Asian Markets with Proper Certification
certification.description: Every market has unique regulatory requirements. We guide Korean brands through the complex certification landscape of Vietnam, the Philippines, Singapore, Malaysia, and other Southeast Asian countries, ensuring full compliance and faster market entry.

offline.title: OFFLINE MARKET TEST
offline.subtitle: Test Before You Scale
offline.heading: Real Customers. Real Feedback. Real Results.
offline.description: Before investing in full market entry, validate your product with real Southeast Asian consumers. Our offline market testing service provides authentic consumer insights, product-market fit validation, and data-driven recommendations for successful launches.
offline.feat1Desc: Temporary retail spaces in high-traffic locations to test product appeal, pricing, and positioning with local consumers.
offline.feat2Desc: Focus groups, surveys, and in-person interviews providing detailed insights into consumer preferences and purchasing behavior.
offline.feat3Desc: Strategic sampling campaigns at events, malls, and partner locations to generate awareness and collect first-hand reactions.
offline.feat4Desc: Comprehensive reports with actionable insights covering demographics, preferences, price sensitivity, and go-to-market recommendations.

marketing.title: MARKETING
marketing.subtitle: Performance-Driven Marketing Solutions
marketing.card1Desc: Strategic social media campaigns across Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok tailored for Southeast Asian audiences.
marketing.card2Desc: Curated influencer partnerships with vetted KOLs and KOCs who resonate with your target demographic.
marketing.card3Desc: Drive real-time sales with interactive livestream shows featuring professional hosts and engaging content.
marketing.card4Desc: Deep market expertise in Vietnam - from cultural adaptation to platform-specific campaigns that deliver results.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.subtitle: Let's Build Something Together
contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.description: Ready to expand into Southeast Asian markets? We'd love to hear about your project and discuss how we can help.

footer.tagline: Global E-Commerce Specialist connecting Korea to Southeast Asia.
